subject: Can we move our onboarding call?
text:
Hi team,

Something came up on our side — could we push tomorrow's onboarding call to later in the week? Thursday afternoon would work great for us.

Thanks!
Mia

subject: Re: Can we move our onboarding call?
text:
Quick follow-up: Friday morning also works if Thursday is too tight. Whatever is easiest for you.

Mia

subject: Invoice #2041 shows our old billing address
text:
Hello,

We moved offices last month and invoice #2041 still shows the old billing address. Could you re-issue it with the address below?

Acme Corp
42 Harbor Way, Suite 300
Rotterdam

Best,
Ben

subject: Password reset link expired
text:
Hi,

I requested a password reset but the link had already expired by the time I opened it. Could you send a fresh one to this address?

Thanks,
Priya

subject: Feature request: CSV export for reports
text:
Hey there,

Loving the product so far. One thing that would help our finance team a lot: a CSV export on the monthly reports page. Is that on the roadmap?

Cheers,
Leo
